name: Span Resort & Spa
description: Nestled along the fast-flowing Beas river in Kullu. Offers 5-star luxury, vast walnut orchards, and ultimate relaxation.

name: Wildflower Hall Shimla
features: Indoor Heated Pool, Luxury Spa, Cedar Forest Views
description: An Oberoi resort set in 22 acres of virgin cedar and pine forests at 8,250 ft. Former residence of Lord Kitchener.

name: The Oberoi Cecil
features: Heritage Property, Valley Views, Michelin-Style Dining
description: A grand heritage hotel on Mall Road since 1884. Restored Edwardian elegance with teak floors and panoramic Shimla valley views.

name: Taj Theog Resort & Spa
features: Infinity Pool, 360° Mountain Views, Jiva Spa
description: Perched on a ridge at 7,200 ft. Unparalleled views of snow-capped peaks and the Sutlej valley. Home to the signature Jiva Spa.

name: The Himalayan Manali
features: Gothic Architecture, Cherry Orchards, Antique Library
description: An 1890s manor in Victorian Gothic Revival style, set amidst apple and cherry orchards with views of the Beas Valley.

name: Rakkh Resort
description: A boutique eco-resort on 12 acres of pine forest. Features an infinity pool overlooking the Shivalik hills and artisanal stone cottages.

name: Castle Naggar
features: Medieval Castle, Roerich Gallery, Valley Panorama
description: A 500-year-old stone castle converted to a heritage hotel. Unmatched views of the entire Kullu Valley.

name: Grand Shangri-La Kaza
features: High Altitude, Stargazing Deck, Spitian Cuisine
description: At 3,800m in the heart of Spiti Valley. Traditional mud-brick architecture with modern comfort. Legendary stargazing deck.

name: The Lodge at Wah
features: Tea Estate, Organic Farm, Kangra Valley Views
description: An eco-luxury homestay inside Wah Tea Estate — the largest working tea plantation in Kangra Valley. Organic meals and Dhauladhar sunsets.

name: Raison Heritage Estate
description: Luxurious 100-year-old stone farmhouse situated among kiwi and apple orchards alongside the river Beas.

name: Great Himalayan Forest Stay
description: Extremely quiet deep-nature stay near GHNP boundary. Organic meals, zero noise pollution, pure detox.

name: Tashi Homestay Kibber
description: Traditional Spitian mud-brick home at one of the highest villages. Authentic meals — thukpa, momos, butter tea.

name: Raju's Riverside Stay
description: Wooden cottage on Tirthan River banks. Home-cooked Himachali meals, trout fishing, GHNP treks arranged.

name: Pine View Cottage Jibhi
description: Cozy wooden cottage surrounded by pine and deodar forest. Bonfire, local food, waterfall treks. Off-grid and peaceful.
